notes: ordinance_districts reconned from the CURRENT bylaw (City of Framingham Zoning By-Law, Aug 2019 ed., §II.A Classes of Districts + Table of Uses) per the Hudson lesson. Framingham did NOT recodify (town->city 2018 kept district codes). G-E = Geriatric/Elderly Housing base district (§II.A.7). HC = Highway Corridor OVERLAY (§III Overlay Districts: 'underlying permitted uses are permitted' — never sets base uses) -> nonbinding so parcels bind to their base district. Vocab-vs-bylaw check enforced via gate-a (first pass flagged G-E + HC, both resolved here).
